# Project Documentation Context

## Core Reference
* SMuFL 1.4 Specification: https://w3c.github.io/smufl/latest/
* Web MIDI API Interface MDN: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Web_MIDI_API

## Local Context
* PROJECT_STATE.md: Current architecture, system capabilities, and recent evolution (including MIDI Thru, Targeted Listening, Dual-Column Layout, and Compound Interval Spelling logic).
* README.md: Project overview and quick start.
* # Prompts/: Detailed requirement history and technical decisions for Chromatic Cluster layout.

## Frameworks
* Vite 8 Configuration: https://vite.dev/guide/
* Tailwind 4.2 Vite Integration: https://tailwindcss.com/docs/installation/framework-guides
* Vitest Testing: https://vitest.dev/guide/
